summary: Phase 3 Frontend Testing: Dashboard tab changes for SUP, ASUP, and RO. All 'My Tasks' tabs removed and replaced with role-specific defect panels. OrangeListPanel verified across all three role modes.

test_results.sup_my_tasks_tab_gone: PASS — 'My Tasks' tab (data-testid='tab-my-tasks') correctly absent from SUP dashboard
test_results.sup_panel_tab_orange: PASS — panel-tab-orange visible showing 'Orange (2)' inside OrangeListPanel
test_results.sup_panel_tab_red: PASS — panel-tab-red visible showing 'Red (3)' inside OrangeListPanel
test_results.sup_panel_tab_yellow_absent: PASS — Yellow tab correctly absent in SUP mode
test_results.sup_mark_working_button: PASS — 2 'Mark Working' buttons (data-testid='panel-mark-working-{id}') visible on defective items
test_results.sup_mark_working_dialog_date: PASS — Date picker button (panel-marked-working-date) shows current date '06 May 2026'
test_results.sup_mark_working_dialog_time: PASS — Time input (panel-marked-working-time) shows current time
test_results.sup_mark_working_confirm_btn: PASS — Confirm button shows 'Confirm Mark Working'
test_results.sup_overview_tab_regression: PASS — Overview tab loads with Electrical dept badge and asset health chart
test_results.asup_my_tasks_tab_gone: PASS — 'My Tasks' tab correctly absent from ASUP dashboard
test_results.asup_my_supervisors_tab_present: PASS — 'My Supervisors' tab present (no regression), shows 3 supervisors
test_results.asup_panel_asup_mode: PASS — OrangeListPanel in ASUP mode loaded correctly
test_results.asup_orange_tab_absent: PASS — Orange panel tab correctly absent in ASUP mode
test_results.asup_red_tab_absent: PASS — Red panel tab correctly absent in ASUP mode
test_results.asup_awaiting_approval_header: PASS — 'Awaiting Your Approval' header visible in ASUP panel
test_results.asup_approve_button: PASS — 1 Approve button (panel-approve-{id}) visible on pending item
test_results.asup_reject_button: PASS — 1 Reject button (panel-reject-{id}) visible on pending item
test_results.asup_approve_dialog: PASS — Approve dialog opens with 'Confirm Approval' button
test_results.asup_overview_tab_regression: PASS — Overview tab works with station/department filters
test_results.ro_my_tasks_tab_gone: PASS — 'My Tasks' tab correctly absent from RO dashboard
test_results.ro_my_supervisors_tab_present: PASS — 'My Supervisors' tab present (no regression), shows 1 supervisor
test_results.ro_panel_tab_orange: PASS — panel-tab-orange visible showing 'Orange (2)' in RO mode
test_results.ro_panel_tab_red: PASS — panel-tab-red visible showing 'Red (3)' in RO mode
test_results.ro_panel_tab_yellow: PASS — panel-tab-yellow visible showing 'Yellow (1)' in RO mode
test_results.ro_readonly_no_mark_working: PASS — No 'Mark Working' buttons visible in RO mode
test_results.ro_readonly_no_approve: PASS — No 'Approve' buttons visible in RO mode
test_results.ro_readonly_no_reject: PASS — No 'Reject' buttons visible in RO mode
test_results.ro_yellow_tab_readonly: PASS — Yellow tab shows items with no action buttons (read-only confirmed)
test_results.ro_overview_tab_regression: PASS — Overview tab works with station filter

critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 3 features correctly implemented. No critical bugs found.
SUP dashboard correctly replaced 'My Tasks' with 'Defects' tab showing OrangeListPanel mode='sup' (Orange+Red subtabs, Mark Working button).
ASUP dashboard correctly replaced 'My Tasks' with 'Yellow List' tab showing OrangeListPanel mode='asup' (Yellow-only, Approve+Reject buttons).
RO dashboard correctly replaced 'My Tasks' with 'Dept Defects' tab showing OrangeListPanel mode='ro' (Orange+Red+Yellow subtabs, read-only).
All existing tabs (Overview, My Supervisors, My Performance) still work correctly — no regressions.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing data: 2 orange + 3 red + 1 pending approval items for SUP/ASUP/RO scope.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 fully tested and verified. All dashboard tab changes working: SUP=Defects tab (OrangeListPanel mode=sup), ASUP=Yellow List tab (mode=asup), RO=Dept Defects tab (mode=ro). All My Tasks tabs correctly removed. No regressions on Overview/My Supervisors/My Performance tabs. Backend tests from Phase 2 remain in /app/backend/tests/test_phase2_features.py (16 tests, all passing).
